_doc: Recurrence-signal patterns scanned against the AI AGENT's OWN output (last assistant message) at session Stop — NOT the user prompt. A match only NUDGES (`sidecar architecture convergence stop-check` re-prompts); the AGENT judges whether it's a real recurrence (→ record into ARCHITECTURE.json `convergence.records[]`, commons root-cause) or a passing mention / false positive (→ just stop). So this is a deliberately WIDE net — precision lives in the agent's judgment, not the keyword. Plain substrings match literally (case-insensitive). The Stop hook nudges once PER DISTINCT MATCHED SIGNAL per session, so a broad false positive (e.g. '또' in '또는') does not consume the nudge for a different real signal later. Override per-repo at .harness/convergence-triggers.json.
hint: 재발 신호 — 같은 원인의 결함/실수가 또 보인다(첫 발생이 아니라 재발). 그 학습을 설계 SSOT 한곳에 박아 같은 결함 재도입을 막아라. ① 기존 기록 확인: `sidecar architecture convergence list` ② 추가/갱신(id-keyed upsert): `sidecar architecture convergence add --id <ID> --state ossified --value "<핵심 학습>" --threshold "<재발조건/해결>" --source <원인파일>`. 인라인 @convergence 주석·별도 incident 트래커로 흩지 말 것 (commons root-cause).
